description: This Kotlin source file defines the MainActivity class for an Android application that demonstrates secure biometric authentication, session management, and interaction with a ViewModel. It manages UI components, lifecycle events, biometric prompts, and navigation logic within the app.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Main UI activity managing biometric auth, session state, and navigation.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes activity, binds views, sets up observers, restores state.

methods.name: onStart
methods.description: Handles activity startup logic, enforces biometric prompt on returning from background.

methods.name: onDestroy
methods.description: Cancels coroutine job on activity destruction.

methods.name: bindViews
methods.description: Associates UI components with layout views.

methods.name: wireClicks
methods.description: Sets button click handlers for login, lock, unlock, call, logout, and clear log actions.

methods.name: observeAuthState
methods.description: Collects and reacts to authentication state changes, including navigation and UI updates.

methods.name: observeStatusLog
methods.description: Updates the status log UI component based on log lines from ViewModel.

methods.name: setButtonsEnabled
methods.description: Enables/disables buttons based on current auth state.

methods.name: maybePromptUnlock
methods.description: Shows biometric prompt if available and needed, handles success/failure.

methods.name: routeToHomeIfUnlocked
methods.description: Navigates to HomeActivity if the user is authenticated and unlocked.
